---
title: "Mary Drew"
---

## Mary Drew

**Dates:** (1847–1927)

**Maiden name:** (Gladstone)

### Description

daughter of W. E. Gladstone

### Biography

She married (2 February 1886) the Rev. Harry Drew.   She had one child, Dorothy (b.1890). [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 1st [1900]
- Letter from April 15th [<i>c</i>. 1890]
- Letter from Feb 1st [1888]
- Letter from April 15th [1887?[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
